inputs.issue_title: Add ParseDuration helper to config package
inputs.plan: Add a ParseDuration function to config/helpers.go that parses duration strings like '30s', '5m', '2h' into time.Duration.
inputs.gathered_context: config package at config/config.go. No existing duration parsing. Standard library time.ParseDuration exists.
inputs.conventions: Errors wrap with fmt.Errorf. Functions are exported with doc comments.
